description_long: This object is a group of various types of bread and pastries, including a large loaf of white bread, a melon pan with a crisscross pattern, a round bun with sesame seeds, a small steamed bun, a sausage roll, and a hot dog bun with visible toppings. The loaf of bread is rectangular with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy white interior. The melon pan is pale yellow with a distinctive grid pattern on top, while the round bun is topped with sesame seeds. The sausage roll is spiral-shaped with a glossy, slightly orange-brown exterior, and the hot dog bun is filled with a sausage and garnished with green relish and ketchup. A small sign with Japanese text and a price is also present, suggesting a bakery or market setting. The breads have a soft, matte appearance, and their surfaces show realistic textural details such as flour dusting, seeds, and scoring.
description: A group of assorted breads and pastries, including a loaf, melon pan, buns, a sausage roll, and a hot dog, all with realistic textures and a bakery sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing all breads clearly, with the loaf of bread, melon pan, buns, sausage roll, hot dog, and a small bakery sign with Japanese text visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the loaf and the rounded backs of the pastries, with the sign and some bread details partially obscured.
description_view_2: Side view with the loaf of bread on the right, and the pastries arranged in a line, showing the side profiles of the sausage roll and hot dog.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the crust of the loaf and the rear of the pastries, with the sign visible from behind.
attribute_crust_pattern: The loaf of bread has a smooth, golden-brown crust with subtle marbling and no visible scoring. The melon pan features a crisscross grid pattern dusted with flour, while the round bun is topped with sesame seeds.
